landing.journeyHeadingBD: Your Study Abroad Journey Made Simple
landing.journeyDescBD: From choosing your course to getting your visa — we handle everything so you can focus on your future
landing.step1Desc: Tell our AI what you're looking for in plain language. Get instant, personalized course recommendations that match your goals, budget, and career aspirations.
landing.step2Desc: Review detailed course information, compare scholarships, explore career pathways, and read real student reviews. Make confident decisions about your education.
landing.step3Desc: Apply directly through our platform with expert guidance. Track your application status in real-time and get personalized support from our experienced counselors.

landing.reachStudentsDesc: Showcase your programs to motivated international students actively searching for their ideal institution.
landing.streamlineOpsDesc: Manage all applications from a centralized dashboard. Use AI-powered tools to generate course content and reduce administrative workload.
landing.growEnrollmentDesc: Increase international student enrollment with better visibility and targeted marketing. Track application trends and optimize your recruitment strategy.

bdStudyAbroad.label: Study Abroad from Bangladesh
bdStudyAbroad.heading: Bangladesh's Most Trusted Study Abroad Partner
bdStudyAbroad.desc: Serving Bangladeshi students since 2017 with local Dhaka expertise, transparent guidance, and a 98% visa approval record across Australia, UK, Canada and New Zealand.
bdStudyAbroad.visaDesc: What Bangladeshi students typically need for an Australian student visa (Subclass 500):
bdStudyAbroad.visaReq1: IELTS Academic score of 6.0 or above (overall)
bdStudyAbroad.visaReq2: Valid Confirmation of Enrolment (CoE) from a registered institution
bdStudyAbroad.visaReq3: Proof of sufficient funds: A$21,041 per year (approximate)
bdStudyAbroad.visaReq4: Overseas Student Health Cover (OSHC) for the full duration
bdStudyAbroad.officeAddress: 4th Floor, Plot-01, Road 10, Sector 6, Uttara, Dhaka-1230
bdStudyAbroad.officeNote: Walk-ins welcome — no appointment needed for an initial consultation
bdStudyAbroad.scholarshipDesc: Many of our partner universities offer dedicated merit and need-based scholarships for students from Bangladesh. Our counselors identify every grant you may qualify for before you apply.
